hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; CMD=$(echo "$ARGS" | grep -oP '"command"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "git (commit|push)"; then echo "Scanning for secrets..."; FOUND=$(grep -rn --include="*.py" --include="*.yaml" --include="*.yml" --include="*.json" -E "(AIzaSy|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sk-ant-|ATATT3x|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[0-9a-zA-Z]{36}|hf_[0-9a-zA-Z]{30})" --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=__pycache__ --exclude-dir=.venv --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude=".env*" . 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secrets detected in tracked files:"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 2; fi; echo "No secrets found."; fi'
